definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">master_effects_control_by_config</field><field name="comment"></field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">master_effects_control_by_config</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">stones_settings</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">master_effect_duration</field><field name="comment">Sets the base duration value for the master effect</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">master_effect_duration</field><field name="value">600</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">recharge_timer</field><field name="comment">Sets the recharge time of the stone</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">recharge_timer</field><field name="value">300</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
